Data Processing Addendum (Singapore PDPA) — Capital Markets and M&A Support between Garnet & Palm LLP and Lattice Meridian Ltd.
Parties: Garnet & Palm LLP (UEN: 201834567N) and Lattice Meridian Ltd. (U E N=2 0 1 9 1 2 3 4 0 X), listed on the StraitX Exchange Mainboard (SXX-ST) and subject to its listing rules.
Contact/DPO: Ms. Alina Chia, DPO, dpo@lattice-meridian.sg, Tel: +65 8934 2210; Legal Ops: legalops@garnetpalm.law for coordination with project counsel.
Scope: processing of employee/shareholder personal data under the PDPA for M&A due diligence and a contemplated debt issuance; this addendum does not itself contain MNPI or trade-sensitive terms.
Direct identifiers to be processed may include NRIC/FIN and passport numbers for verification and screening; example (invalid checksum for illustration): N R I C   S 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 A; Passport E9876543Q.
Banking for payroll or LTIP administration (if applicable): Account No. 032-1199-004 (client ledger), SWIFT: ZLNXSG00; we do not collect device MAC addresses or serials.
Data minimisation: redact address lines except for postal code; sample: 55 Red Fern Cres, #10-08, Singapore 449933; role-only contacts such as “HR Manager” are not treated as PII.
Processing instructions: MNPI, if any, must be quarantined; do not email MNPI; upload to vault at https://vault.lattice-meridian.sg/share?deal=ProjectTamarind&uen=201834567N.
For DSARs under the PDPA, submit via https://privacy.lattice-meridian.sg/dsar?ref=UEN-201834567N&case=S1234567A; postal alternative: PO Box 772, Cormorant Rd, Singapore 900772.
Public contacts that are non-PII: borrower helpline 1800-000-0000, careers@lattice-meridian.sg, and generic form labels like “Name:________, NRIC:________”.
Retention: HR records 7 years post-cessation; capital-markets workpapers 6 years from transaction close; any Exchange announcement already public is treated as generally available information.
Cross-border transfer: to processors in JP and AU under comparable protection with SCC-equivalent clauses; vendor: Indigo Byte Pte. Ltd. (UEN 202145678R) acting as data intermediary.
Incident response: notify within 24h to Ms. Alina Chia and the listing sponsor; however, disclosure to the Exchange is coordinated to avoid premature release.
Employment-specific notes: collection of phone numbers and work emails of candidates strictly for interviews; the public hotline above is not collected as PII.
Compliance note: nothing here constitutes or reveals material non-public information under the Securities and Futures Act; internal draft only; v0.3.
